nodes.name: artifact_policy.yaml
nodes.summary: Machine-readable harness contract: immutable-artifact globs, stale-text scan patterns (retired claims), privacy/redaction scan rules, and report-worthy file patterns; consumed by ethical_benchmark/harness/agent.py.

nodes.name: default.yaml
nodes.summary: Local development config: all five model pairs (10 aliases) with shared model_ids, benchmark definitions (HarmBench/XSTest/MMLU), greedy decoding, seed 42.

nodes.name: tc1.yaml
nodes.summary: TC1 SLURM cluster config at the 128-token budget: partition UGGPU-TC1, offline-mode env vars, per-model sbatch grouping (the original study; superseded as primary by tc1_512).

nodes.name: tc1_512.yaml
nodes.summary: TC1 config for the PRIMARY 512-token study (D41): same pairs and methodology as tc1.yaml with max_new_tokens 512, writing to results_512/.

nodes.name: tc1_int8.yaml
nodes.summary: TC1 config adding LLM.int8 members per pair for the precision-sweep point at the 128-token budget.

nodes.name: tc1_int8_512.yaml
nodes.summary: TC1 config for INT8 members at the primary 512-token budget (precision sweep fp16 -> INT8 -> NF4).

nodes.name: tc1_sensitivity.yaml
nodes.summary: Decoding-sensitivity config (128 budget): sampled decoding variants to test robustness of conclusions to temperature.

nodes.name: tc1_sensitivity_512.yaml
nodes.summary: Decoding-sensitivity config at the 512-token budget: multi-seed sampled decoding for the primary study's robustness check.
